legal.notice: By playing, you agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

terms.intro: Welcome to HEREOS. By accessing the game and creating an account, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1: HEREOS is a free online clicker RPG game. The service is provided as-is, without guarantee of permanent availability.
terms.s2: You must provide a valid email address and a password. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Only one account per person is allowed.
terms.s3: The following are prohibited: cheating, bug exploitation, harassment, hate speech, spam, and any attempt to disrupt the service.
terms.s4: All game elements (graphics, text, code, music) are the property of HEREOS. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
terms.s5: In case of rule violations, we reserve the right to suspend or delete your account without notice.
terms.s6: We may modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of major changes.
terms.s7: For any questions, use the in-game report system or contact us via chat.

privacy.intro: We take the protection of your data seriously. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.
privacy.s1: We collect: email address, username, IP address, game data (progress, statistics, chat messages).
privacy.s2: Your data is used to: operate the game, ensure anti-cheat security, improve the gaming experience, communicate with you.
privacy.s3: Data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are hashed and never stored in plain text.
privacy.s4: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except when required by law.
privacy.s5: We use technical cookies necessary for the game to function (session, CSRF). No advertising cookies are used.
privacy.s6: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.s7: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. After account deletion, data is erased within 30 days.
